posts.title: first
posts.text: 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031import java.util.HashMap;import java.util.Map;class Solution { public int findMaxLength(int[] nums) { int maxLength = 0; Map<Integer, Integer> map = new HashMap<Integer, Integer>(); // 前缀和 int counter = 0; // 遍历从0开始,举例[0,1] map.put(counter, -1); // 最长向后遍历实现，1和0连续相同数量通过前缀和相等相减实现 for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; ++i) { if (nums[i] == 1) { counter++; } else { counter--; } if (map.containsKey(counter)) { // 区间长度 maxLength = Math.max(maxLength, i - map.get(counter)); } else { map.put(counter, i); } } return maxLength; }}

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post 1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server 1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files 1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites 1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
